name: Indian Fry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except oil in a bowl until combined.
2. Form the mixture into a ball and flatten it with your hands.
3. Cut the dough into pieces about 2 1/2-inches wide and 1/2-inch thick.
4. Heat the oil in a frying pan or deep fryer.
5. Fry the dough pieces until both sides are brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
